data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding routing based on score/policy.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for routing to queue/review/workflow based on score/policy. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific details or records that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The existing evidence focuses on bookings and member invitations but lacks the necessary details to confirm the requirement is met, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of routing to queue/review/workflow based on score/policy.
